package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_rate_limiter_per_request: Layer: Resource pooling. Flag rate limiter construction inside request handlers instead of per identity or dependency.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule582NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario582Negative(records []Rule582NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
